assignments.title: Senior Project Proposal
assignments.description: Submit a detailed proposal for your senior capstone project including objectives, methodology, and timeline

assignments.title: Project Implementation Phase 1
assignments.description: Complete the first implementation milestone of your AI project

assignments.title: Final Project Demo
assignments.description: Present your completed AI project with live demonstration

assignments.title: Database Design Assignment
assignments.description: Design a normalized database schema for an e-commerce application

assignments.title: Query Optimization Lab
assignments.description: Optimize SQL queries for performance using indexing and query planning

assignments.title: Sprint 1 Deliverables
assignments.description: Complete user stories and submit sprint retrospective

assignments.title: Sprint 2 Deliverables
assignments.description: Implement core features and conduct user testing

announcements.title: Project Demo Day Scheduled
announcements.content: The final project demonstrations will be held on December 10th in Keller Hall. Please prepare a 15-minute presentation.

announcements.title: Office Hours Update
announcements.content: Office hours this week will be moved to Thursday 2-4 PM due to the conference.

announcements.title: Database Server Maintenance
announcements.content: The database server will be down for maintenance on Saturday from 2-4 AM. Plan your work accordingly.

announcements.title: Sprint Planning Meeting
announcements.content: Sprint 2 planning meeting will be held on Monday at 3 PM. Attendance is mandatory.

grades.feedback: Excellent proposal with clear objectives and well-defined methodology. Great attention to detail.
